_comment: Dragon Shrine reveal (showrunner 2026-07-17: jump-cut to the spot, slow pan). Absolute path. JUMP-CUT to the start eye (ticks:1), then a SLOW PAN/push-in to the settle over 110 ticks, holding 30. Look-at target = the showrunner focal coord (2003, 82, 921) (raised ~2 for statue height). Rig y = eye-1.78. CAMERA EYES ARE FIRST-PASS ESTIMATES — air-verify the eye path + sight line in-world (this site did not load for offline probing) and nudge, or re-record with /cutscene record add. Trigger from the shrine begin-trial with 'cutscene play dragon_shrine_reveal'.

cues.subtitle: §7Prove yourself worthy of the guardian within.
